title: Embracing Flexibility in Your Career
content:
## Embracing Flexibility in Your Career
Kate Ryder, Vanessa Vidas and Arie van Wijngaarden recently published an article in CCCA Magazine on the importance of fostering flexible and dynamic career paths for a new generation of lawyers. See below to view the full article.
Read Embracing Flexibility in Your Career
This article originally appeared in the Spring 2018 edition of CCCA Magazine.
- Vanessa Vidas Chief of Staff to the Senior Leadership Team People.Offices.Singular Toronto
